name: iLand
author: VCraftGames
description: Powerful land plugin, based on PMMP**
readme_markdown:
iLand


[![Lint](https://poggit.pmmp.io/ci.shield/VCraftGames/iLand/iLand)](https://poggit.pmmp.io/ci/VCraftGames/iLand/iLand) **Powerful land plugin, based on PMMP** # Features - Land management with Form UI - The border of the selected land - Custom land settings - Customize the person you trust - Transfer of land owners - Land sale - Support multiple languages - Easy setup. # How to Install 1. Download the latest version 2. Place the `iLand.phar` file into the `plugins` folder. 3. Restart the server. 4. Done! # TODO - [✔️] Main Form - [✔️] Manage Form - [✔️] Teleport Form - [✔️] Settings Form - [❌] OP Form - [✔️] Anti Attack Land - [✔️] Set Pos Claim System - [✔️] Particel area selected - [✔️] Added Icon For Form - [✔️] Land Border - [❌] Capital Support # Additional Notes - If you found bugs or want to give suggestions, please visit here or join our Discord server. - We accept all contributions! If you want to contribute, please make a pull request in here. # Credits | Logo | Description | | ------------- | ----------- | | | iLand icons created by Smashicons - Flaticon |
